_meta.convention: folder-per-layout: each layout is its own folder (layouts/<folder>/LAYOUT-<name>/) holding layout.json (canonical manifest) + preview.html (pure interactive Browse render) + index.html (object/JSON inspector) + README.md. Diverges from the one-file-per-layout line in DOCUMENTATION-STANDARD v1.1; standard update pending sign-off.
_meta.renderStandard: All preview.html renders follow ../LAYOUT-RENDER-STANDARD.md (DD-R01..R06): the render IS the layout, behaves like FileMaker Browse mode, Excel-grid density, desktop-scaled/zoomable, manifest-driven + generic, theme via one token block (provisional).
_meta.auditModel: This roll-up is the source of truth for 'what layouts exist' + the cross-layout view. Each layout carries occurrenceId, the join key into relationships/_index.json (the TO graph) and (via binding.valueList on objects) into value-lists/_index.json. Audits are QUERIES over these indexes, not a stored xref. High-level cross-layout data lives ONLY here; layout folders stay lean. See meta/relationship-audit-model.md + meta/value-list-tracking-model.md.
_meta.viewerDecision: DECIDED (Michael, 2026-07-16): shared object/JSON inspector becomes standalone app 'z-fm-layout-object-viewer' at the filemaker/ folder level (filemaker/z-fm-layout-object-viewer/), NOT repo root. Loads any FMP app's layout.json by slug+path; computes the relationship/audit joins live. BUILD PENDING explicit go-ahead.

layouts.name: GLOBAL_Settings
layouts.renderNote: preview.html is a tight 4-global skeleton (App Name, Current User, App Version, Environment) per Michael 2026-07-16. layout.json still describes the fuller 16-object future build; retrofit the manifest when the full build resumes.
